title: Mirrored Fields - Showing only the latest Record

posts.author: jacklam (Jack Lam)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve ran across this a couple of times.

Boards involved: For a one to many linking situation, for example board A record linking to board B with multiple matching records.

When linking a mirrored board, it’s not possible to show only the latest record (as decided by a date field) from board B on board A. I’ve confirmed this with tech support that this cannot be done, and would like this to be added.

This can either be a condition set when linking the boards (much like the sort in a SQL join), or customized for each linked field to see which one is shown (more like how it works now, each linked field is independent of each other).

Thanks,
Jack
